title: Technical Electrical
description: Technical Electrical is a 1.21 sandbox style NeoForge modpack about relaxing and having fun alone or with friends! Build, Destroy or Control the world, with tech or magic! (Includes Public Dedicated SMP Server!)
body: # Summary **Technical Electrical** allows you to create anything you can imagine in your worlds. You can build machines that can allow you to take control of the world or embrace nature and magic to integrate yourself into the world and its biomes. Technical Electrical's philosophy is that one mod for one use, which helps keep the pack light. Mods are all carefully chosen to help keep resource usage low, whilst having a fun modded experience. Technical Electrical is about having fun in a modded environment. A minimal stress modpack, just kickback and relax with friends! There are a large variety of tech and magic mods letting you play how you want. ## Mods **Over 190 mods including:** **Ars Nouveau** **Applied Energistics** **Ballistix** **Create** **Genetics Resequenced** **Modern Industrialization** **Mekanism** **Modular Force Field Systems** **PneumaticCraft Repressurized** **Immersive Engineering** **Security Craft** **Stellaris** **Computer Craft** **Occultism** **Totemic** **And much more!** Other included mods can be seen in the file dependencies This pack has also been optimised for **Steam Deck**, the only thing you have to do is assign key bindings, but it works and performs well on the Steam Deck. ## Server > There is also a Dedicated Server for Secret Schemes that can be joined using the > 'Connect to Server' button on the main menu! > Create your own server with the server packages below! > > **Secret Schemes, Whimsical Wonders and Eclectic Espionage**: (Server can be can be installed using Superpack and setting it to server mode) https://github.com/Gaming32/Superpack/releases/tag/v0.3) > > **Mechanistic Mayhem**: (https://drive.google.com/file/d/10Kzi4HCTQ9Eh641nj7Gg6UUabHNWnvt9/view?usp=sharing) > > **Final Frontiers**: (https://drive.google.com/file/d/18JbhAAToDHyT3PH6EFFJNYivSb3JfE0L/view?usp=sharing) > > > To stay up to date with future updates be sure to join the Technical > Electrical Discord Server! https://discord.gg/JbfD6s9 ![Secret Scheme Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PmwWNPV6/images/872a1869991dfc4f99945768b2607275d6f0a0ab.webp) **Sponsored by Meloncube** Want a fast and afforable Minecraft server that is easy to set up use Meloncube! **Get 25% off your first month by using code "waddon1"**
